title: UnitedHealthcare
description: UnitedHealthcare is one of the largest health insurance providers in the US, offering individual plans, employer coverage, Medicare, and Medicaid options nationwide.
features: Individual & family plans, Medicare Advantage, Employer group plans, Prescription drug coverage, Telehealth services, Wellness programs

title: Aetna
description: Aetna offers a wide range of health insurance plans including HMO, PPO, EPO, and HDHP options with access to a large national provider network.
features: HMO, PPO & EPO plans, Prescription drug coverage, Dental & vision add-ons, Telehealth services, Wellness incentives, Large provider network

title: Cigna
description: Cigna provides comprehensive health insurance plans with a strong focus on preventive care, mental health support, and global coverage options.
features: Individual & family plans, Medicare plans, International coverage, Mental health support, Preventive care, Cigna Wellbeing program

title: Humana
description: Humana specializes in Medicare Advantage, Medicare Supplement, and individual health plans with a strong emphasis on wellness and preventive care.
features: Medicare Advantage plans, Medicare Part D, Individual health plans, Dental & vision coverage, Wellness rewards program, Fitness benefits

title: Blue Cross Blue Shield
description: Blue Cross Blue Shield is a federation of health insurance companies covering all 50 states with the broadest provider network and comprehensive coverage options.
features: Individual & family plans, Medicare coverage, Employer group plans, National provider network, Prescription drug coverage, Telehealth services

title: Kaiser Permanente
description: Kaiser Permanente is an integrated health system offering both health insurance and healthcare delivery with coordinated care through its own hospitals and clinics.
features: Integrated care model, HMO plans, Online appointment scheduling, Digital health tools, Prescription drug coverage, Preventive care focus

title: Molina Healthcare
description: Molina Healthcare focuses on providing affordable health insurance to individuals and families eligible for Medicaid, Medicare, and marketplace plans.
features: Medicaid plans, Medicare plans, Marketplace plans, Prescription coverage, Behavioral health services, 24/7 nurse hotline

title: Anthem
description: Anthem offers health insurance plans across multiple states with a focus on affordable coverage, digital tools, and access to a large provider network.
features: Individual & family plans, Medicare plans, Employer group plans, Anthem Health Rewards, Sydney Health app, Telehealth services
